text_block_list.text:
Lately, rumors of Biwa Hayahide going on an
indefinite hiatus have spread across the racing
world. Hearing such talk sends Narita Brian into a
rage.

She reflects on her sister's condition up until this
point. The thought that Hayahide may never
return shakes Narita Brian to her core.

However, when I ask her whether truly believes
that's true, she's reminded of her sister's strength
and—through tears—chooses to believe in her.

While this is happening, Biwa Hayahide is
earnestly devoting herself to her rehabilitation to
return to the track, with no thought of giving up
in her head.
